label: 1532 CE
era_summary: Year 1532 (MDXXXII) was a leap year starting on Monday of the Julian calendar.

rome_italy.summary: Active conflicts in 1532: Emperor-Italy, 1532-33. No Maddison GDP coverage for this region — economy held at neutral 50, reflecting the thin pre-modern record outside the European core. Governance held at neutral (V-Dem coverage starts 1789).
